title: begonia scabridoidea
intro: Begonia scabridoidea, also known as the hairy begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Begonia scabridoidea include the treatment of fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal and anti-emetic agent. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried, crushed, and used in infusions or decoctions to reap its medicinal benefits.
